titleStmt.title: SII 26.316: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 316. (A.R. No. 298 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription describes the king as one ‘who was pleased to take Madurai, Īḻam, Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya and who was pleased to anoint the heroes and the victors’.

It records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the same temple occurring in No. 315, etc., above by a certain Palakaṇṇaṉ Vīdīviṭaṅkaṉ Vaḍuganāthan of Iṟaiyūr. in Kuṉṟa-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkaṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam, He endowed 3 paḻaṅkāśu for this purpose and the same was accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Dēvappiḷḷai alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭaṉ, son of Āḻvāṉbhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja-[gōtra], who had right of worship in the temple. Further details are missing.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉmuṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭu virāvapiṣegamum vicaiyā Api
ṣegamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya tiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 3 muppattu muṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkko
ṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟaṉāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Immaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭ
ṭattuk kuṉṟaṉāṭṭu Iṟaiyūṟ palakaṇṇaṉ vitiviṭaṅkaṉ vaṭukaṉātaneṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civa
brāhmaṇan pārattuvāci Āḻvāṉpaṭṭaṉ makaṉ tevappiḷḷaiyāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭaṉeṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 3 IppaḻaṅIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.316 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
